assessment_objectives.objective: a record of personnel accountability is retained to ensure there is a record of all access granted to an individual (system and application-wise).
a record of personnel accountability is retained to ensure there is a record of who provided the authorization.
a record of personnel accountability is retained to ensure there is a record of when the authorization was granted and when the access was last reviewed.
a record of personnel accountability is retained to ensure there is a record of when the access was last reviewed.
